THE CASE AND THE PAGA ACTION, SUAREZ V. INTEGRATED SECURITY SERVICES, INC., NO. CGC-22-597580, ARE REASSIGNED TO THE HONORABLE ETHAN P. SCHULMAN TO CONDUCT ANY FURTHER PROCEEDINGS. PARTIES MUST CONTACT THE CLERK FOR DEPARTMENT 304 VIA EMAIL AT COMPLEXLIT@SFTC.ORG STATING THE DATE ON WHICH A SUPPLEMENTAL FILING WILL BE SUBMITTED AND THEIR AVAILABILITY FOR A HEARING AT LEAST FIVE COURT DAYS AFTER THE SUBMISSION OF THE SUPPLEMENTAL FILING. IF THE PARTIES ELECT TO DO SO, THEY MUST CONTACT THE CLERK FOR DEPARTMENT 304 VIA EMAIL AT COMPLEXLIT@SFTC.ORG STATING THE DATE ON WHICH A SUPPLEMENTAL FILING WILL BE SUBMITTED AND THEIR AVAILABILITY FOR A HEARING AT LEAST FIVE COURT DAYS AFTER THE SUBMISSION OF THE SUPPLEMENTAL FILING. (SEE WORD DOCUMENT FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

PLAINTIFF LESLIE SUAREZ, INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARY SITUATED'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS AND REPRESENTATIVE ACTION SETTLEMENT [RE-SET PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES.]
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LESLIE SUAREZ, INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARY SITUATED'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS AND REPRESENTATIVE ACTION SETTLEMENT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The case and the PAGA Action, Suarez v. Integrated Security Services, Inc., No. CGC-22-597580, are reassigned to the Honorable Ethan P. Schulman to conduct any further proceedings.

The parties may stipulate to the tentative ruling, in which case the Court will enter an order that adopts the tentative ruling, sets a date for a supplemental filing, and sets a continued hearing date for the motion. If the parties elect to do so, they must contact the clerk for Department 304 via email at ComplexLit@sftc.org stating the date on which a supplemental filing will be submitted and their availability for a hearing at least five court days after the submission of the supplemental filing. If the parties elect to do so, they must contact the clerk for Department 304 via email at ComplexLit@sftc.org stating the date on which a supplemental filing will be submitted and their availability for a hearing at least five court days after the submission of the supplemental filing.

(See Word document for complete ruling.)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
